name: Potatoes: Chipotle and Rosemary
recipeIngredient: 15 small red new potatoes (tiny ones, 1-2 inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the ingredients for 10 minutes, or until the potatoes are knife-tender.
2. Drain and discard the peppercorns and rosemary sprig (only the woody part remains).
3. Cut the potatoes in half while warm.
4. In a large mixing bowl, add the potatoes to the spices and mix until coated.
5. Grill on stovetop steam grill or heat on griddle until slightly dried and not-quite-blackened.
